desc: Exports the active Revit model (or a scoped subset) to a local SQLite snapshot database.
summary: Exports the active Revit model (or a scoped subset) to a local SQLite snapshot database. Runs on the Revit thread via CommandExecutor to avoid Microsoft.Data.Sqlite assembly resolution failures that occur when snapshot_export is called directly from MCP. Uses ModelSnapshot for data extraction and SnapshotDatabase for storage. Sets SnapshotRegistry.Current on success so downstream query tools can read the snapshot.
usecase: User wants to query model data via snapshot tools (snapshot_query, snapshot_review, snapshot_apply).
notfor: Direct live model queries — use MCP context tools instead. Not for model modification.
precondition: Active document must be open. Temp directory must be writable.
postcondition: SQLite snapshot database written to temp path. SnapshotRegistry.Current set to new DB.

config_inputs.name: scope
config_inputs.description: Export scope: model, level, levels, view, scope_box, category, selection, sheet

config_inputs.name: level_names
config_inputs.description: Comma-separated level names for multi-level export

config_inputs.name: scope_box_name
config_inputs.description: Scope box name for scope-box-scoped export

outputs.name: db_path
outputs.description: Path to the snapshot SQLite database

preprompts: Exporting model snapshot to local database...
Taking a snapshot of your model for analysis...
successprompts: Snapshot ready — {elements} elements, {parameters} parameters exported in {duration_ms}ms
Model snapshot complete. {elements} elements captured at scope: {scope}
